tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
  Every time our eyes meet, this feeling inside me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
  Is almost more than I can take[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
  Baby, when you touch me, I can feel how much you love me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
  And it just blows me away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
  I've never been this close to anyone or anything[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                        [ch]Eb[/ch]
  I can hear your thoughts, I can see your dreams...[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                    [ch]G[/ch]
  I don't know how you do what you do[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
I'm so in love with you, it just keeps getting better[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
  I wanna spend the rest of my life with you by my side[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Forever and ever[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
  Every little thing that you do[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]
Baby, I'm amazed by you[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
  The smell of your skin, the taste of your kiss[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                          [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
  The way you whisper in the dark[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
  Your hair all around me, baby you surround me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                           [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
  You touch every place in my heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]
  Oh, it feels like the first time every time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                            [ch]Eb[/ch]
  I wanna spend the whole night in your eyes...[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                    [ch]G[/ch]
  I don't know how you do what you do[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
I'm so in love with you, it just keeps getting better[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
  I wanna spend the rest of my life with you by my side[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Forever and ever[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
  Every little thing that you do[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]
Baby, I'm amazed by you[/tab]


[Solo]

[ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]


[Chorus]

[tab]      N.C.              [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Every little thing that you do[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
I'm so in love with you, it just keeps getting better[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
  I wanna spend the rest of my life with you by my side[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Forever and ever[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
  Every little thing that you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
  Every little thing that you do[/tab]
[tab]                  N.C. [ch]G[/ch]
Baby, I'm amazed by you[/tab]
